violations.description: Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Milk in refrigerator found at 50 F. Milk was opened approximately 2 hours ago and will be used within 2 hours. -Facility added ice to milk in refrigerator.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Areas in need of repair.
